name: @metorial/squarespace
description: Manage e-commerce operations for Squarespace merchant sites. Retrieve, create, update, and fulfill orders, including importing orders from third-party channels. Manage products (physical, service, gift card, and download types) with variants, images, and pricing. Track and adjust inventory stock levels across product variants. Access customer profiles, mailing list subscribers, and donors. Retrieve financial transaction data across Squarespace, Stripe, PayPal, and Square payment gateways. Get site information such as name, URL, currency, and time zone. Subscribe to webhooks for order creation and update events. Access form submission data for workflow automation.
